3 years: Exit load of 3% if redeemed within 1 year, 2% if redeemed after 1 year but within 2 year, 1% if redeemed after 2 year but within 3 year.
operations.taxation: Returns are taxed at 20%, if you redeem before one year. After 1 year, you are required to pay LTCG tax of 12.5% on returns of Rs 1.25 lakh+ in a financial year.
